description:
Operating Area: Turkey

Do you plan a yacht hire vacation in Bodrum or Marmaris? Would you like to sail along Turkish coast with your friends and family? Then 31-meter ARCHSEA is a beautiful choice for you. The motor yacht was built by HG Yachting in Turkey. She is luxury, classy, and elegant and available for magnificent charter experience alongside the turquoise coast of Turkey.
ARCHSEA was delivered to her owner in 2014. Since then she’s been spending time mostly in Antalya marina and in the nearby cruising area. The yacht is in excellent state for charters. All the interior and exterior features are brand new.
Her modern and stylish interior design with neutral tones leading the space create the mood of lightness. Each stateroom has large windows allowing plenty of natural light to illuminate the space.
ARCHSEA accommodates up to 9 guests in one master, one VIP, one Single and two twin cabins. Each cabin features spacious ensuite facilities.
The yacht’s sundeck serves as an airy playground for all the members of the group featuring al fresco dining area and a Jacuzzi loved by both kids and adults.
A wide sunbathing area with eight comfortable sun matrasses is located foredeck where there’s also one more lounging area perfect for watching natural heritage of the surrounding landscapes or for an evening cocktail rendezvous.
A dedicated team of five marine professionals is happy to welcome guests and offer them the best nautical vacation on board motor yacht ARCHSEA, a floating villa with a great crew.

blueprint.name: ARCHSEA
tenders: 6 m Tender with 150 Hp outboard engine

crew.name: Mehmet Uygun
crew.bio:
Nationality: Turkish 
Age: 43 
Gender: Male

Captain Mehmet has been working in the yachting industry for more than twenty years. 
Originally from Bodrum, he chose to dedicate his life to the sea and hospitality because 
both were his great passions. He loves the ma-rine lifestyle. For the past fifteen years,
Captain Mehmet has been working as a master on both sailing and motor yachts of different dimensions.

His favorite cruising ground is the Mediterranean. He knows the area very well. However, 
his heart belongs to the native Aegean coast of Turkey. Additionally to his native Turkish, 
captain speaks English and some German.

Under his command, the crew of ARCHSEA performs as a single organism. In work, Captain Mehmet values full commitment, discipline, and extra efforts to make sure that his guests are having their best time on board the yacht. When not at work, captain Mehmet loves spending time with his wife and a 6-year old son. He also loves fishing, cooking, and diving and can recommend to his guests some great places to enjoy the rich underwater world of the sea.

crew.name: Can Yıldız
crew.bio:
Nationality: Turkish 
Age: 36 
Gender: Male  

First Mate Can was born in 1989 in Bodrum. He began working in the maritime industry at the age of 13 and graduated from Bodrum Maritime High School.

During in his career, he served as a first mate on various motor yachts such as Mary, Merve, Spleendido and Black Seagull.

Can has a strong passion for reading, diving, hunting and he is also highly skilled in repair, renovation and electrical work. He is a great team member and has a hardworking personality committed for success.

He speaks English fluently and 2025 season will be his first year on Archsea.

crew.name: Orhan Akgün
crew.bio:
Nationality: Turkish 
Age: 43 
Gender: Male 

Chef Orhan was born on 14 September 1982 in Kayseri. With 26 years of experience, Orhan has been working in the maritime industry for the past 4 years.

At the beginning of his career, he worked in various restaurants and later served as a chef in prominent hotels such as Izmir Çeşme Altınyunus, Club Sultan and IC Green Palace.

Orhan prepares unique dishes from world cuisines for his guests.

He is very energetic and strong crew member believes the power of team work and a true nature and motorcycle enthusiast.

He speaks intermediate-level English and 2025 season will be his first year on Archsea.

crew.name: Enis Bayhan
crew.bio:
Nationality: Turkish 
Age: 38 
Gender: Male

First Engineer Enis was born in 1987 in Hamburg, Germany and graduated from the High 
Maritime School.

Enis has been working in the maritime industry for 3 years and has served as both a 
deckhand and first engineer on a private yacht named Y2.

His hobbies include hunting, diving, and fishing, and in addition to these, he is highly 
skilled in renovation, repair and electrical work.

Enis speaks intermediate English and is fluent in German. The 2025 season will be his first 
year on Archsea.
